programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Max has met a lovely woman who seems to enjoy his company also -- but shes part of a theft ring that cleaned out the Harts

programme.title: Cagney 408
programme.desc: A weekend spent clearing up lousy precinct paperwork leads Chris and Mary Beth to race to serve a warrant before the statute of limitations expires Meanwhile Det Petrie finds his weekend used up painting his apartment

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A go-go dancer is discovered murdered and bound with television antenna wire She was a former policewoman and girlfriend of Starskys which sparks him and Hutch to tap several eccentric informants for a lead on the crazed killer

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A European terrorist cell takes refuge in a spiritualist community in the US that shuns all exposure to technology Using the community as a front they plan to destroy a new southwestern US hydro-electric facility and for exposure they invite a prominent TV journalist Kelly Dayton to witness the event When Kelly and her escort pilot String are captured by the terrorists some quick thinking on the part of the ace pilot results in their escaping their captors but String and Airwolf must stop the terrorists before they complete their plan of destruction and flood the valley settled by the spiritualists

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After being denied a raise Carlos goes after Ronnies reputation in a vengeful act of spite First when an unexpected guest arrives at Ronnie and Froys repo theyre scrambling to uncover her true identity Later Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac whose drastic approach to save his car sends Matt running for the hills And finally when Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van will their personal problems result in a catastrophic loss TV-14-L

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: When Ronnie takes the fall for losing their previous repo Carlos tries to make amends

programme.title: Sing Cowboy Sing
programme.desc: Joe and Benny are two cowboys are on tour in the Wild West as a singing duo usually without a penny in their pockets to spare Joe is a talented rodeo-rider which fascinates the little girl Susanne and gives her the wish to have him as a father Her mother Maria however is to marry the evil rich farmer Dave Susanne wants to stop the wedding so she sneaks aboard Joe and Bennys wagon to persuade them to intervene Dave brands them as kidnappers forcing them to flee as outlaws to one of the families tyrannized by Dave Together they strike back at Dave at which point Maria sees that hes the wrong man for her

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A TV shock journalist gives an on-air tour of an eerie haunted house

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A cursed antique harp becomes the motive for murder and the focus of Nicks investigation

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Gilligan is bitten by a rare deadly insect The Professor informs him that he has 24 hours left to live

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa is upset to learn that Little Luke wants to grow up to be a scientist rather than continuing farming in the MCcoy tradition

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Both Grampa and his best friend George have their caps set on the new librarian

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Now knowing that Max is a spy Max and his Army buddy go up against the KAOS agent know as the Maestro

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max ends up as a Fugitive after he is convicted of robbing a bank and killing a man On his way to the death house he sees the one-hand man and escapes to find him

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ befriends the Tiptons an elderly but feisty couple being forced out of their home and into a retirement community that is being used as a cover for an illegal skin flick operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur is all set to enjoy a weeks vacation relaxing at home but his plans are ruined when his overbearing Aunt Martha and her talking parrot unexpectedly drop by for a prolonged visit

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: While Mister Ed phones in racing tips to Pimlico Race Course the Posts and the Addisons play Find The Statue

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants Klink to forget about a promotion so he plays cupid for him and General Burkhalters sister

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: There seems to be a traitor in the escaped prisoner pipeline and Hogan has to find him by following the escape route

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Combat Photographer is assigned to the 73 to get some footage of the Crew in action Gruber borrows his movie camera to use in a money-making scheme Then when complications develop McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to avoid trouble for both themselves and the Photographer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys scheme to get rid of a troublesome new member of the 73 Crew and in the process wind up in big trouble But the new Crewman - Who happens to be the spitting-image of Binghamton - Turns out to be quite useful in a complicated plan to get them off the hook

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: On her wedding day Cindy Jenner Smalley sees or thinks she sees her dead father Hank a famous country-western singer who vanished shortly after arranging his wifes mercy killing ten years before Dan takes the case

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeway is chosen to star in a new dog food ad campaign but the creator has a secret ingredient and will kill to hide it

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A melodramatic marriage crisis of one of the townsfolk keeps interfering with Dicks book deadline

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna allow Kirk to hold his new singles group at the inn

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: In the second season opener the series develops a more supernaturalweird tone as Mitch and Griff investigate a sunken freighter where they fight for their lives against an unknown force and realize that the freighter might have been sunk by a New Guinea sea monster according to a woman they found floating in the ocean near sunken wreckage of her sailboat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: Mikey And Nick
programme.desc: Nicky is on the run from the mob and he turns to old pal Mikey for help

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While trying to outfox Rosco Bo and Luke happen upon a race track where Cale Yarborough is secretly testing a new turbo supercharger for an upcoming race The Duke boys offer to help Cale keep the engine away from the dreaded Jethro brothers who have approached Boss and Rosco for help in obtaining the engine at all costs

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili Vorjak and the baby flee to find a shuttle to escape Earth Liam and Sandoval are both tracking them - for different reasons Augur is on the run from volunteers but sends a friend Juliet to help Liam while hes gone

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane trades bodies with Swamp Thing after setting a trap using Will as bait

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane creates two cyborgs to hunt down the sole survivor of Dr Woodrues experiment

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young 315
programme.desc: Young 315

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A supposedly reformed sex offender is being brainwashed by his psychiatrist into believing he has committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A beautiful woman seduces Kimble as part of a plan to have her lover kill him and his rich invalid wife so they can get married

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While returning to Stockton Victoria and Jarrod stop in a town with outrageous prices for food lodging and services After finding out the people are bilking travelers to survive the Barkleys decide to open a shipping business to save the town-despite opposition from a territorial boss with a rival freight company in the area

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: After a close friend of Cheyenne is killed during the escape of bank robbers Cheyenne and Smitty track the band of outlaws across the border to a small Mexican village The band has taken over the town after killing 14 young men there

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Ron Levin a wealthy businessman has disappeared No body is found but there was a list with instructions in his house - a recipe for murder Its author Joe Hunt is the defendant The successful young business man had formed a team of prestigious former fellow students for a risky project which should make them all rich His partners claim they didnt know about the means

programme.desc: Phil Melissa Mitch Mary and Vinnie are high school friends who unwittingly raise the dead on Halloween night Once the dead have returned Pitchford Cove will never be the same againor will it

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Welterweight Wisniewski wants payback, after Jorge Masvidal used his training in underground, and barely legal fights, to whip Keith’s brother in a previous match. This fight features Masvidal’s freestyle technique and utter disregard for danger versus Wisniewski’s appetite for vengeance.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her…Amanda Buckner.

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Nick Ring Hk43

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Will Quijada v. Sean Kearney

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadgets skiing holiday is interrupted when MAD try to rob a Swiss bank of its gold reserves

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby instructs Gadget to retrieve a powerful microcomputer from MAD that is capable of teleportation

programme.title: Challenger of the GoBots
programme.desc: A damaged Turbo is repaired by two teenagers who unaware hes a GoBot enter him into a Grand Prix race; when the Renegades spot him the race turns into a demolition derby

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades persuade a disgruntled genius to use his new weapon against the Guardians
